query:
SELECT 
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN startMonth = 1 THEN arrUsd ELSE 0 END), 0) as jan_arr,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN startMonth = 2 THEN arrUsd ELSE 0 END), 0) as feb_arr,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN startMonth = 3 THEN arrUsd ELSE 0 END), 0) as mar_arr,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN startMonth IN (1,2,3) AND startYear = 2026 THEN arrUsd ELSE 0 END), 0) as q1_total
FROM deals 
WHERE aeId = 30002 AND startYear = 2026 AND (isChurned = 0 OR (isChurned = 1 AND churnYear > 2026))
command:

  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN startMonth = 1 THEN arrUsd ELSE 0 END), 0) as jan_arr,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN startMonth = 2 THEN arrUsd ELSE 0 END), 0) as feb_arr,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN startMonth = 3 THEN arrUsd ELSE 0 END), 0) as mar_arr,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN startMonth IN (1,2,3) AND startYear = 2026 THEN arrUsd ELSE 0 END), 0) as q1_total
FROM deals 
WHERE aeId = 30002 AND startYear = 2026 AND (isChurned = 0 OR (isChurned = 1 AND churnYear > 2026))
